message: Path is not inside a Dandiset
We were unable to parse header data from this NIfTI file. Please ensure it is not corrupted or mislabeled.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: HEDVersion
issueMessage: Field description: If HED tags are used:
The version of the HED schema used to validate HED tags for study.
May include a single schema or a base schema and one or more library schema.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: GeneratedBy
issueMessage: Field description: Used to specify provenance of the dataset.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SourceDatasets
issueMessage: Field description: Used to specify the locations and relevant attributes of all source datasets (BIDS or not).
Valid keys in each object include `"URL"`, `"DOI"` (see
[URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)), and
`"Version"` with
[string](https://www.w3schools.com/js/js_json_datatypes.asp)
values.
_T1w.nii[.gz] files must have exactly three dimensions.

The gzip header contains a non-zero timestamp.
This may leak sensitive information or indicate a non-reproducible conversion process.

The gzip header contains a non-empty filename.
This may leak sensitive information or indicate a non-reproducible conversion process.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ReceiveCoilActiveElements
issueMessage: Field description: Information describing the active/selected elements of the receiver coil.
This does not correspond to a tag in the DICOM ontology.
The vendor-defined terminology for active coil elements can go in this field.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MatrixCoilMode
issueMessage: Field description: (If used)
A method for reducing the number of independent channels by combining in
analog the signals from multiple coil elements.
There are typically different default modes when using un-accelerated or
accelerated (for example, `"GRAPPA"`, `"SENSE"`) imaging.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: CoilCombinationMethod
issueMessage: Field description: Almost all fMRI studies using phased-array coils use root-sum-of-squares
(rSOS) combination, but other methods exist.
The image reconstruction is changed by the coil combination method
(as for the matrix coil mode above),
so anything non-standard should be reported.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PulseSequenceType
issueMessage: Field description: A general description of the pulse sequence used for the scan.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: NonlinearGradientCorrection
issueMessage: Field description: Boolean stating if the image saved has been corrected for gradient
nonlinearities by the scanner sequence.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PartialFourierDirection
issueMessage: Field description: The direction where only partial Fourier information was collected.
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0018, 9036](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0018,9036))
`Partial Fourier Direction`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InstitutionalDepartmentName
issueMessage: Field description: The department in the institution in charge of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: TracerRadLex
issueMessage: Field description: ID of the tracer compound from the RadLex Ontology.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: TracerSNOMED
issueMessage: Field description: ID of the tracer compound from the SNOMED Ontology
(subclass of Radioactive isotope).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: TracerMolecularWeight
issueMessage: Field description: Accurate molecular weight of the tracer used.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: TracerMolecularWeightUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Unit of the molecular weights measurement (for example, `"g/mol"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SpecificRadioactivityMeasTime
issueMessage: Field description: Time to which specific radioactivity measurement above applies in the default
unit `"hh:mm:ss"`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MolarActivityMeasTime
issueMessage: Field description: Time to which molar radioactivity measurement above applies in the default
unit `"hh:mm:ss"`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InfusionRadioactivity
issueMessage: Field description: Amount of radioactivity infused into the patient.
This value must be less than or equal to the total injected radioactivity
(`"InjectedRadioactivity"`).
Units should be the same as `"InjectedRadioactivityUnits"`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InfusionStart
issueMessage: Field description: Time of start of infusion with respect to `"TimeZero"` in the default unit
seconds.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InfusionSpeed
issueMessage: Field description: If given, infusion speed.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InfusionSpeedUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Unit of infusion speed (for example, `"mL/s"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InjectedVolume
issueMessage: Field description: Injected volume of the radiotracer in the unit `"mL"`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: Purity
issueMessage: Field description: Purity of the radiolabeled compound (between 0 and 100%).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PharmaceuticalName
issueMessage: Field description: Name of pharmaceutical.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PharmaceuticalDoseAmount
issueMessage: Field description: Dose amount of administered pharmaceutical.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PharmaceuticalDoseUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Unit format relating to pharmaceutical dose
(for example, `"mg"` or `"mg/kg"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PharmaceuticalDoseRegimen
issueMessage: Field description: Details of the pharmaceutical dose regimen.
Either adequate description or short-code relating to regimen documented
elsewhere (for example, `"single oral bolus"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PharmaceuticalDoseTime
issueMessage: Field description: Time of administration of pharmaceutical dose, relative to time zero.
For an infusion, this should be a vector with two elements specifying the
start and end of the infusion period. For more complex dose regimens,
the regimen description should be complete enough to enable unambiguous
interpretation of `"PharmaceuticalDoseTime"`.
Unit format of the specified pharmaceutical dose time MUST be seconds.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InjectionEnd
issueMessage: Field description: Time of end of injection with respect to `"TimeZero"` in the default unit
seconds.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ReconMethodImplementationVersion
issueMessage: Field description: Identification for the software used, such as name and version.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AttenuationCorrectionMethodReference
issueMessage: Field description: Reference paper for the attenuation correction method used.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ScaleFactor
issueMessage: Field description: Scale factor for each frame. This field MUST be defined if the imaging data (`.nii[.gz]`) are scaled.
If this field is not defined, then it is assumed that the scaling factor is 1. Defining this field
when the scaling factor is 1 is RECOMMENDED, for the sake of clarity.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: ScatterFraction
issueMessage: Field description: Scatter fraction for each frame (Units: 0-100%).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DoseCalibrationFactor
issueMessage: Field description: Multiplication factor used to transform raw data (in counts/sec) to meaningful unit (Bq/ml).
Corresponds to [DICOM Tag 0054, 1322](http://www.dicomlookup.com/dicomtags/(0054,1322))
`Dose Calibration Factor`.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: PromptRate
issueMessage: Field description: Prompt rate for each frame (same units as `Units`, for example, `"Bq/mL"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SinglesRate
issueMessage: Field description: Singles rate for each frame (same units as `Units`, for example, `"Bq/mL"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: RandomRate
issueMessage: Field description: Random rate for each frame (same units as `"Units"`, for example, `"Bq/mL"`).
_T1w.nii[.gz] files must have exactly three dimensions.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: StimulusPresentation
issueMessage: Field description: Object containing key-value pairs related to the software used to present
the stimuli during the experiment.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: TaskName
issueMessage: Field description: Name of the task.
No two tasks should have the same name.
The task label included in the filename MAY be derived from this `"TaskName"` field
by removing all non-alphanumeric or `+` characters (that is, all except those matching `[0-9a-zA-Z+]`),
and potentially replacing spaces with `+` to ease readability.
For example `"TaskName"` `"faces n-back"` or `"head nodding"` could correspond to task labels
`faces+n+back` or `facesnback` and `head+nodding` or `headnodding`, respectively.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: Instructions
issueMessage: Field description: Text of the instructions given to participants before the recording.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: TaskDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Longer description of the task.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: CogAtlasID
issueMessage: Field description: [URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)
of the corresponding [Cognitive Atlas](https://www.cognitiveatlas.org/)
Task term.
